doc: Pinned Ed25519 verification keys for the calibration manifest endpoint. This file is the trust anchor: the verifier rejects any manifest whose signing_key_id does not appear here, with valid_from <= now < valid_until (or valid_until=null).
long_horizon_replay_note: Per chain spec §8.2, replay tooling MUST load the trusted_keys.json bundled with the *pinned* skill_version from the chain, not the current trusted_keys.json. Old keys (rotated out of newer skill releases) MUST remain in the version-pinned bundle for the full manifest retention horizon (7 years per endpoint spec §9).

keys.notes: Bootstrap test key for round-trip verification. Generated 2026-04-25 alongside Batch 3 minimal vertical slice. NOT for production manifests — production keys land here when Batch 2 server signing service generates them.
